cases.public_message: Which version of the desktop client was installed when the incident occurred?
cases.title: Ask for the installed desktop client version

cases.public_message: What was the exact local time of the failure, including the time zone?
cases.title: Ask for the failure time and time zone

cases.public_message: Please attach the application.log and launcher.log files from the affected device.
cases.title: Ask for two named diagnostic log files

cases.public_message: List the steps that reproduce the problem, starting from sign-in.
cases.title: Ask for ordered reproduction steps

cases.public_message: Please provide a screenshot that includes the complete error code and message.
cases.title: Ask for a screenshot with the complete error

cases.public_message: How many users are affected, and which usernames can we use for testing?
cases.title: Ask for an affected-user count and test usernames

cases.public_message: Were you connected through the corporate VPN, and from which office or network?
cases.title: Ask for VPN and network-location details

cases.public_message: Which deployment version introduced the behavior, and what is the related change ticket?
cases.title: Ask for deployment and change-ticket identifiers
